role: Pure-Rust Cargo workspace (8 crates) that declaratively manages this dual-RTX-5090 box: env-manager (engine+cli+gui — TOML components; verbs auto-detect/install/auto-fix/reset/doctor/dashboard) + secrets stack (secrets-engine pure-Rust vault, secretd/secretctl gRPC, libSQL remote). It owns the meta environment boundary — PATH, dotfiles, ~/.local, and the canonical home tree (envctl/home, ADR-0006) that ~/.claude/{settings.json,CLAUDE.md,RTK.md} and meta/settings.json symlink into; it holds secrets and auto-injects them on demand.
northstar: envctl owns and contains the meta environment: every FlexNetOS tool/dotfile/.local/bin resolves inside meta; user-global ($HOME/.local, ~/.claude) holds ONLY symlinks into meta; envctl exports META_ROOT (resolved from the .meta.yaml marker, like meta_core's META_DATA_DIR) so no config hardcodes paths; secrets are held and auto-injected. Heal not harm; never downgrade; never delete (archive).
